PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?artist ?artistLabel(SUM(?unitsSold) AS ?totalSales) WHERE {
  ?artist wdt:P106 wd:Q33934 ; wdt:P135 ?genre .
  ?genre wdt:P279 * wd:Q45981 .
  ?work wdt:P175 ?artist ; wdt:P2664 ?unitsSold .
  ?artist rdfs:label ?artistLabel .
  FILTER(lang(?artistLabel) = 'en')
}
GROUP BY ?artist ?artistLabel
ORDER BY DESC(?totalSales)
LIMIT 1
